_patch_meta.description: Verse context classification — batch VCB-016, 85 relevant terms, 1186 verse_context records. 33 all-verses-fail terms (no records). Verse count discrepancies flagged for Claude Code: mti=338 (declared 2, actual 3), mti=339 (declared 38, actual 40), mti=74 (declared 66, actual 71), mti=118 (declared 47, actual 55), mti=134 (declared 71, actual 73), mti=193 (declared 6, actual 7), mti=194 (declared 3, actual 4), mti=238 (declared 19, actual 35). mti=6435 H2491B treated as all-verses-fail (extract contains slain/killed records only — profanation sense verses correctly assigned to mti=134 H2490H; flag for Claude Code integrity check). Decision D-001: mti=1142 vids 40842/40846/40848 classified as set-aside (Option A). All classifications use actual verse_record_ids from extract JSON per governing instruction.
